title: ADJUTORIX Runtime Limits Registry
description: Canonical machine-readable registry of hard and soft runtime limits across app, preload, main process, agent, CLI, scheduler, verify, replay, ledger, command execution, watchers, artifacts, and release flows. This registry defines bounded operational envelopes so governed behavior fails predictably rather than degrading into ambiguous state.
invariants: Every consequential runtime surface must operate within declared size, time, count, and concurrency bounds.
Soft limits may warn or degrade behavior, but hard limits must fail closed with explicit reason codes.
No limit may silently expand by environment or release channel without being declared here.
Timeouts, queue depth, and persistence bounds must be chosen to preserve recoverability and deterministic auditability.
Renderer-visible limits may guide UX but may not weaken authoritative main or agent enforcement.

limits.title: Maximum RPC Request Size
limits.description: Upper bound for a single JSON-RPC request body accepted by the governed agent surface.

limits.title: Maximum RPC Response Size
limits.description: Upper bound for a single JSON-RPC response payload before callers must use artifact references or pagination.

limits.title: Default RPC Request Timeout
limits.description: Default per-request timeout for synchronous RPC handling unless method-specific orchestration takes over.

limits.title: Maximum Concurrent Jobs
limits.description: Upper bound for simultaneously running governed jobs in the scheduler.

limits.title: Maximum Queued Jobs
limits.description: Upper bound for admitted but not yet running jobs retained by the scheduler.

limits.title: Scheduler Poll Interval
limits.description: Internal scheduler polling interval for queue advancement and timeout checks.

limits.title: Job Heartbeat Interval
limits.description: Expected interval between heartbeats for running governed jobs.

limits.title: Default Job Timeout
limits.description: Upper bound for long-running jobs before timeout handling is enforced if no stricter profile applies.

limits.title: Maximum Remembered Workspaces
limits.description: Maximum number of recent workspace entries persisted for session restore and recent-open lists.

limits.title: Large Workspace File Count Threshold
limits.description: File count threshold beyond which workspace classification becomes degraded and watch/scan behavior may narrow.

limits.title: Large Workspace Total Bytes Threshold
limits.description: Total workspace size threshold beyond which scans and UI behaviors may degrade.

limits.title: Maximum Inline Preview Size
limits.description: Maximum file size eligible for inline preview without requiring alternate handling.

limits.title: Maximum Inline Diff Size
limits.description: Maximum diff payload size rendered inline before artifact or summarized rendering is required.

limits.title: Mutation Extra Confirmation Threshold
limits.description: File size above which mutation requires stronger UX warning or extra confirmation semantics.

limits.title: Watcher Poll Interval
limits.description: Polling interval used when native file watching is unavailable.

limits.title: Maximum Watched File Size
limits.description: Files larger than this are excluded from detailed watcher-driven incremental handling.

limits.title: Watcher Burst Coalescing Window
limits.description: Time window used to coalesce watcher bursts into a single governed update batch.

limits.title: Default Command Timeout
limits.description: Default timeout for governed command execution unless stricter command-profile limits apply.

limits.title: Maximum Command Output Capture
limits.description: Upper bound for captured stdout/stderr retained as authoritative command evidence before truncation handling applies.

limits.title: Maximum Terminal Session Buffer
limits.description: Upper bound for terminal transcript bytes retained in memory per interactive session.

limits.title: Mutation Guard Verify Freshness
limits.description: Maximum age for mutation-guard verify results before they become stale for consequential actions.

limits.title: Release Guard Verify Freshness
limits.description: Maximum age for release-guard verify results before they become stale for release promotion.

limits.title: Maximum Verify Check Items
limits.description: Upper bound for serialized check items inside a compact verify summary before artifact indirection is required.

limits.title: Maximum Replay Steps
limits.description: Upper bound for replay step count processed in a single authoritative replay run before segmented replay is required.

limits.title: Maximum Replay Artifact Size
limits.description: Upper bound for a single replay artifact before segmentation or summary-only output is required.

limits.title: Maximum Ledger Entry Payload
limits.description: Upper bound for a single ledger entry payload before referenced artifact indirection is required.

limits.title: Maximum Ledger Edges per Entry
limits.description: Upper bound for graph edges attached to a single ledger entry before edge compaction or artifact indirection is required.

limits.title: Maximum Inline Diagnostics Items
limits.description: Upper bound for inline diagnostics items returned directly to UI or RPC consumers before pagination or artifacts are required.

limits.title: Maximum Diagnostics Payload Size
limits.description: Upper bound for a diagnostics payload before indirection, summarization, or pagination is required.

limits.title: Maximum Runtime Log File Size
limits.description: Rotation threshold for general runtime structured log files.

limits.title: Maximum Runtime Log File Count
limits.description: Number of rotated runtime log files retained before older files are pruned.

limits.title: Audit Log Retention
limits.description: Retention window for local audit-oriented structured logs.

limits.title: Maximum Release Artifact Manifest Items
limits.description: Upper bound for artifacts listed directly in a single release manifest before bundle partitioning is required.

limits.title: Maximum Release Metadata Bundle Size
limits.description: Upper bound for release metadata bundle size before artifact decomposition is required.

limits.title: Maximum Open Editor Tabs
limits.description: Soft cap for simultaneously open editor tabs before the UI warns and may deprioritize restoration behavior.

limits.title: Maximum Inline Outline Items
limits.description: Upper bound for outline items rendered inline before summarization or virtualization is required.

limits.title: Maximum Preload Bridge Payload
limits.description: Upper bound for a single request or response payload crossing the preload bridge without artifact indirection.

limits.title: Maximum Recent Notifications
limits.description: Soft cap on retained recent app notifications for UI recall/history surfaces.

limits.title: Maximum CLI Machine Output
limits.description: Upper bound for machine-readable CLI stdout before output must switch to artifact reference mode.

limits.title: Agent Health Evaluation Interval
limits.description: Internal agent health evaluation interval for readiness and degraded-state reporting.
